Title: Add Item to Cart
Steps: 1. Go to product page\n2. Click 'Add to Cart' button

Title: Remove Item from Cart
Steps: 1. Add item to cart\n2. Go to cart\n3. Click 'Remove' button

Title: Checkout Process
Steps:
1. Add item to cart
2. Go to checkout
3. Enter valid payment details
4. Submit order

Title: Search Product
Steps: 1. Enter product name in search bar\n2. Click search
